retry_reason: The put always executes and never fails in a meaningful way; retrying a put would cause a double-free bug.
contract_summary: This function consumes an skb reference by calling dev_kfree_skb_any, which decrements the skb's refcount and frees the packet if the refcount reaches zero. The caller must have owned a valid reference on the skb before calling this function and must not use the skb afterward. The trace call is purely diagnostic and does not affect ownership or lifecycle.
